settings.greeting: Hi! Feel free to ask me anything about GPS RUNNER Naoki Shimizu 😊
settings.fallback: Sorry, I couldn't find an answer to that. Please contact us via the form below and Naoki will get back to you!

questions: What does a GPS runner do?
entries.answer:
GPS art is the practice of running specific routes using a smartphone GPS app to draw pictures or letters on a map.

Naoki Shimizu established this as the 'world's first profession.' He has created ~1,600 artworks across 12 countries, covering over 19,000km.

Naoki Shimizu (born 1987, Hyogo, Japan) is the world's first professional GPS Runner.

He was a primary school teacher before becoming a full-time GPS artist in 2019.

His mission: to create a 'non-competitive' running culture. Motto: RUN FOR SMILE.

Featured in 160+ media outlets, active in 12 countries.

questions: How do I book a talk?
Can I invite Naoki to my event?
entries.answer:
Thank you for your interest!

Services available:
・Motivational talks (schools, companies, local governments)
・GPS Plogging Art Walk
・GPS Walk & Run event

Available nationwide, overseas, and online. Please contact us 1–2 months in advance.

Use the contact form to get in touch!

questions: How much does a talk cost?
entries.answer:
Pricing varies depending on the content, scale, and location.

We're happy to discuss options within your budget — just let us know what you have in mind.

👉 Reach out via the contact form and mention your budget for a faster response!

questions: Tell me about the support plan
entries.answer:
Thank you for wanting to support the journey!

【Monthly Support Plans】
■ THANK YOU: ¥390/month
  Monthly activity report + Supporters Wall listing

■ DOUBLE THANKS: ¥780/month (Most popular)
  Above + exclusive photos & videos

■ PERSONAL SPONSOR: ¥3,900/month
  Above + annual limited goods + GOLD badge

All plans can be cancelled anytime. See the SUPPORT page for details!

questions: What media coverage has he had?
entries.answer:
Yes! Featured in 160+ media outlets.

Highlights:
・Kansai TV 'Yoi Don!' — designated as a Living National Treasure (2025)
・Guest at Expo 2025 Osaka
・Various TV, newspapers, and web media

Visit the WORKS page to see more!

Yes! Naoki has been active in 12 countries.

Highlights:
・Taiwan: circumnavigation 1,135km (24 consecutive marathon days)
・Peru: alpaca land art (4,600km)
・Europe & Asia: various artworks

See the GLOBAL page for the full story!

questions: What's the best way to reach out?
entries.answer:
You can reach us through:

・Contact form: official.gps-run.com/en/contact.html
・Email: gpsrunnaoki@gmail.com
・Instagram: @gps_naoki
・YouTube: @gpsrunnertv

We look forward to hearing from you!

Yes! Follow along on:

📸 Instagram: @gps_naoki
▶️ YouTube: @gpsrunnertv
👍 Facebook: naoki.shimizu.526

Follow for the latest runs, artworks, and adventures!

questions: How do I run with Naoki?
entries.answer:
We'd love to have you!

Naoki hosts GPS Walk & Run events and Plogging (running + litter-picking) events open to everyone.

Event info is posted on Instagram (@gps_naoki) and the website.

Companies and groups are welcome to organize a private event too — just ask!
